data.title_en: The resident's invocations for the traveler

items.chapter_title_en: The resident's invocations for the traveler
items.arabic_text: (( أَسْتَوْدِعُ اللَّهَ دِينَكَ، وَأَمَانَتَكَ، وَخَوَاتِيمَ عَمَلِكَ)).
items.english_text: (I place your religion, your faithfulness and the ends of your deeds in the trust of Allah.)

items.chapter_title_en: The resident's invocations for the traveler
items.arabic_text: ((زَوَّدَكَ اللَّهُ التَّقْوَى، وَغَفَرَ ذَنْبَكَ، وَيَسَّرَ لَكَ الخَيْرَ حَيْثُ ما كُنْتَ)).
items.english_text: (May Allah endow you with taqwa, forgive your sins and facilitate all good for you, wherever you be.)(taqwa: a comprehensive term which refers to all good actions and obedience i.e. performing the commanded actions and avoiding the prohibited actions.)

LANGUAGE_ARABIC_TRANSLATED_TEXT.raw: (Zawwadakal-lahut-taqwa, waghafara thanbak, wayassara lakal-khayra haythuma kunt.)
